evals.prompt: Show me the saved keyword research in the Priority set for project example-project and tell me what needs attention.
evals.expected_output: Should use report id saved-keywords through seo_list_reports, seo_describe_report, and seo_run_report. Should inspect dataStatus, the complete set and returned view counts, metric freshness, missing versus observed-zero values, tags, page mappings, findings, and caveats before suggesting a small number of next steps.
assertions: Uses report id saved-keywords through the discovery flow
Passes projectId example-project and set Priority
Distinguishes missing provider metrics from observed zero values
Treats tags and page mappings as planning evidence rather than proof of intent, rankings, or indexing

evals.prompt: Read page two of the service tag in my Priority keyword set and confirm the whole set has no gaps.
evals.expected_output: Should use saved-keywords with the service tag and a bounded offset, but refuse to call a filtered or paginated view a complete-set all-clear. Should state the returned and matched coverage and recommend reviewing the complete view before making a set-wide conclusion.
assertions: Uses saved-keywords with the requested tag and bounded pagination
Does not call a filtered or paginated view a complete-set all-clear
Keeps returned rows, matched rows, and total saved keywords distinct
